title: Support Contact Monday form : add the subject and a cc-email

Be able to add a clear subject

posts.author: delia (Délia Figueira)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

When I contact Monday for assistance (bug, question) I would need two new features to be displayed :

  • Be able to add a clear subject
    right now my incoming e-mails from Monday Support team look messy and mainly start with Hello., can you, my bug is…
    bug1220×405 39.9 KB

- Add a cc e-mail
As we are several people working on the IT team, it would be nice to be able to add a CC- e-mail from my team directly in the form.

Thanks, and I hope it will not take two years to be done

Délia
